subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-01-23
subcodes.first_line: In this Day physical sacrifice hath no value; rather, it is the inner afflictions, hardships and tribulations of the Bahá'ís [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز قربانی جسمانی قیمتی ندارد مشکلات و مصائب و بلیات داخلهٴ بهائیان را
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom
